protocols.Paper_title: Improved two stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: “Percent viability was measured after washing with ice-cold water (twice), ice-cold 10% glycerol (once), and a single freeze thaw… (0.1% Triton X-100)… compatible with our autolysis/hydrolysis protocol”
